            // confirmButtonColor: "#ec6c62",

            }
        });
    });
})
即係點？ 可唔可以解釋一下

Constant relay_count = 374891

Mean every time they show the counter, it will start at 374891 or more

replies.msg: 出個數永遠係const +1
